seo.title: Waterblommetjies in the Boland - Marinda Kook

html:
Winter just can't go by without a waterblommetjie on the table. I usually make my waterblommetjie bredie with red meat. A few days ago I ate waterblommetjie bredie with chicken at a friend's place. It was such a treat that I made it again today.

Let your waterblommetjies soak overnight in strong salt water. I put 125 ml of salt in my bowl. This kills off all the bugs and draws out the sand and dirt. Rinse it thoroughly a few times under the tap.

INGREDIENTS

  1. 1 kg waterblommetjies
  2. 1.5 kg chicken pieces
  3. 2 onions
  4. 6 potatoes, cut into quarters
  5. 4 cloves garlic, finely chopped
  6. 6 allspice berries
  7. 2 chicken stock cubes dissolved in 500 ml hot water
  8. 250 ml white wine
  9. juice of 2 lemons
  10. 2.5 ml ground nutmeg
  11. salt and pepper to taste

NOW:

  • slice your onions into rings and fry them in a pot on the stove in a little oil
  • brown your chicken pieces nicely in the same pot too, and add everything to the chicken except the waterblommetjies
  • cook everything together for about 40 minutes
  • add your waterblommetjies and cook for another 15 minutes – the waterblommetjies mustn't be cooked to mush

Enjoy it on white rice with a glass of cold white wine…
